---
pagetitle: "Workshop 2026 - Some Digital Twins and Generative AI in geoscience"
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-header}
[Invited Talk]{.page-header-badge .badge-upcoming}

# Some Digital Twins and Generative AI in geoscience

[Fahimeh Farahnakian · Invited Speaker]{.tagline}

::: {.meta}
[Day 2]{} [June 2, 2026]{} [AIEPS Workshop 2026]{} [30 min]{}
:::

::: {.actions}
[Back to Programme](../2026.qmd#programme){.btn-act .secondary}
[Speaker Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/farahnakian/){.btn-act .primary target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.content-body .session-detail}

## Abstract

Abstract will be updated soon.

## Speaker Bio

[Fahimeh Farahnakian](https://www.linkedin.com/in/farahnakian/) is an invited speaker at AIEPS 2026.

My research interests include Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Data Analysis, Autonomous Driving and Remote Sensing. I currently seek to advance computer vision technology via deep learning for remote sensing applications and geospatial data.

## Materials and Images

- Slides: To be added.
- Related links: To be added.
- Images: To be added.

:::
